LightningComponentBundle.description: Flow screen component — vehicle selection with daypart/rate card preview and inline budget line entry. Used in the Create Local Ad Proposal flow.

property.name: selectedVehicleId
property.label: Selected Vehicle ID
property.description: ID of the vehicle the salesperson selected. Passed to the Apex action.

property.name: budgetLinesJson
property.label: Budget Lines JSON
property.description: JSON array of budget line rows [{channelId, month, fiscalYear, plannedAmount, notes}]. Parsed by the CreateLocalAdProposal Apex invocable.
